author: Jesse T
text: Saw it on our way to another restaurant, decided to give it try and loved it! We got the Paneer 65 appetizer with an order of butter chicken and Korma chicken. All of it delicious. The chicken was so tender and juicy. Rice was top notch as well. Everything was excellent!

author: David
text: As you can tell from the pictures, the food was thoroughly devoured and that's because it was delicious. Their Chicken Tikki Masala is divine and if you like spicy food the Hot option was perfect for me. Not insufferably spicy but spicy enough to have a desired kick. Dip a order of Garlic Naan into the dish's sauce and you're in heaven. Delicious food, absolutely plan on coming back and if you haven't eaten here you definitely need to.
